<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kamuharano- Shrine | native_name = 綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kamuharano- Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.78678|135.816391}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kamuharano- Shrine | native_name = 綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kamuharano- Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.78678|135.816391}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kamuharano- Shrine | native_name = 綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kamuharano- Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.78678|135.816391}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kamuharano- Shrine | native_name = 綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kamuharano- Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.78678|135.816391}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamuharano- Shrine'''|綺原坐健伊那大比賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
